description: Configure three distinct flight configurations in the dual_parachute_deployment.ork rocket design using component overrides to ensure each mission carries only its specific payload. In the Payload section, replace any existing mass components with three new ones: Atmos Sensor (150g), Bio Sample (300g), and Dummy Payload (50g). Create three flight configurations named Mission Alpha (carrying only the Atmos Sensor), Mission Beta (carrying only the Bio Sample), and Mission Gamma (carrying only the Dummy Payload), all using the Aerotech J420R motor. Run the simulations for all three configurations, save the rocket design to ~/Documents/rockets/multimission_payload.ork, and record the simulated apogee altitudes for each mission in a report at ~/Documents/exports/mission_matrix_report.txt.
